heading: Accounting and use of appropriations
label: 715k–4 Accounting and use of appropriations
text: Funds appropriated each fiscal year pursuant to sections 715k–3 to 715k–5 of this title shall be accounted for, added to, and used for purposes of the migratory bird conservation fund established pursuant to .1section 718d of this titleSo in original. Probably should be capitalized.1
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Migratory Bird Conservation Act which comprises this subchapter.
